name: Mushroom Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté onion and garlic in butter and wine until soft (2 to 3 minutes). Add mushrooms and cook until they release moisture.
2. Add carrots, broccoli, thyme, and marjoram, and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Remove pan from heat and set aside.
3. Gently squeeze excess water out of the tofu using your hands, then puree with half-and-half in a blender or food processor until smooth. Stir into the vegetable mixture.
4. Stir parsley and cheeses into the vegetable mixture and spoon into pie shell. Bake until firm in the center and lightly brown (about 40 minutes). Let cool before slicing.
